race.comment: NARBOLD (13) was three weeks between runs when slow into stride and raced without luck in the straight to finish eleventh over 1500m at Rosehill. Senior rider hops back aboard and can finish much closer here. IT'S A KNOCKOUT (14) key jockey change third-up and can return to form quickly despite drawing out. Has a good record over this course and distance and best form is on rain affected tracks. LUGH (2) undefeated in two second-up runs and finds an easier race with the claim. Closed well on resumption when fifth over 1300m at this track. Anywhere near his best can beat these. EMIRATE (9) in career best form and gets the right run with the extra weight. Stays in the mix. THUNDERLIPS (3) has a good record over this track and trip and expected to show up today.
